name: Etwall, Hatton and Hilton

locations.address:

Civic Way,

Derby,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Hilton, Hatton, Etwall, Egginton, Burnaston, Church Broughton, Marston on Dove, Scropton, Foston, Sutton on the Hill, Long Lane, Lees, Dalbury, Osleston, Trusley, Radbourne, Thurvaston, Sapperton and the Pastures Estate Mickleover. It belongs to the South Derbyshire Local Policing Unit.

This is a large predominantly rural area split by the A50 stretching from the A38 Toyota island to the A515/A52 junction at Sudbury
